_comment: WC2026 Group B, MD3 (simultaneous). Standings before: Switzerland 4, Canada 4, Bosnia 1 (1-1 Canada, 1-4 Switzerland), Qatar 1 (1-1 Switzerland, 0-6 Canada). Near-dead rubber: both can reach only 4 and Switzerland/Canada (on 4, playing each other) will leave at least one on 5+ -> Bosnia/Qatar almost certainly out. Pride/rotation game. Bosnia clearly the stronger side; Qatar weak (conceded 6 to Canada). Bosnia favourite + goals plausible, but flat-motivation caveat. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Both on 1 point and all but eliminated: a pride match. Bosnia the stronger side; Qatar weak and beaten 0-6 by Canada.

home.name: Bosnia & Herz.
notes: Decent European side; competitive vs Canada (1-1), outclassed by Switzerland. attack 1.22.
Dead rubber -> motivation uncertain, but quality edge clear.

away.name: Qatar
notes: Weak going forward; lost 0-6 to Canada, drew Switzerland. attack 0.72.

_postmatch.result: Bosnia 3-1 Qatar. Bosnia won comfortably; Qatar scored once. 4 goals.
_postmatch.verdict: 1X2 hit -- the quality side won as called. The dead-rubber motivation caveat did not bite: Bosnia were clearly better and won by two. The total ran Over (4 goals vs a slight Under lean) and Bosnia overperformed their xG (1.62 -> 3); Qatar's goal denied the modelled clean sheet, but the central read (comfortable Bosnia win) was correct. Despite the win Bosnia finish 3rd on GD (Canada 2nd via better GD; H2H was a 1-1 draw).
_postmatch.lesson: Clear quality gap vs a weak side -> back the favourite even in a dead rubber; the 3-1 margin is upside finishing variance around a correct mean.
